description: Canonical structure for a character record in a storytelling universe. Version 1.1 extends the v1.0 core with production profiles for voice, animation, and image generation, plus narrative metadata for Story Studio and downstream AI systems. Supports human, animal, and vehicle characters through a shared core and kind-specific profiles.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this document format. Use 1.1.0 or later for records that include v1.1 fields.

id.description: Stable, immutable identifier for the character. Never change once assigned. Used in filenames, URLs, APIs, and cross-references.

name.description: Primary display name of the character. Retained for v1.0 compatibility. When displayName is present, consumers should prefer displayName for presentation and treat name as a legacy alias.

canonicalName.description: Official canonical name used in documentation, credits, and authoritative references. Does not change unless canon is deliberately revised.

displayName.description: Current presentation name shown in apps, websites, and Story Studio. May evolve over time without affecting id.

nickname.description: Primary informal name used in dialogue and friendly contexts.

aliases.description: Additional alternative names, nicknames, or titles beyond nickname.

status.description: Editorial lifecycle state of this record.

summary.description: Brief overview of the character suitable for lists, cards, search results, and API summaries.

description.description: Extended narrative description of the character for long-form profiles and story generation context.

catchphrase.description: Signature phrase associated with the character, used in dialogue and marketing.

storyRoles.description: Narrative roles this character fulfills across stories. Supports standard roles and custom kebab-case extensions.

storyFunctions.description: Functional story archetypes used by Story Studio to match characters to story types (e.g. explorer, helper).

personality.description: Core temperament and behavioral patterns for consistent portrayal.

moralValues.description: Core ethical principles that guide the character's decisions. Distinct from personality traits — these represent values, not behaviors.

strengths.description: Positive traits, skills, or qualities. Each character should have at least one.

weaknesses.description: Limitations, flaws, or growth areas. Each character should have at least one.

birthday.description: Birth date and age information. All fields are optional to support characters whose exact birthday is unknown.

favorites.description: Optional personal preferences that enrich story generation and character depth.

signatureItems.description: Iconic belongings closely associated with the character. May reference object records by id.

appearance.description: Visual and physical presentation shared across character kinds.

voiceProfile.description: Structured voice attributes for AI voice generation, audiobooks, and animation dialogue direction.

animationProfile.description: Named animation references for games, interactive apps, and AI animation pipelines.

imageProfile.description: Model-agnostic visual generation settings for AI image tools, books, and marketing assets.

promptProfile.description: Reusable prompt templates for AI systems. Complements dedicated profiles; does not replace them.

kindProfile.description: Kind-specific attributes. Must align with the value of kind.

relationships.description: Connections to other characters or entities.

capabilities.description: Notable abilities, functions, or affordances relevant to storytelling.

tags.description: Free-form labels for discovery, filtering, and grouping.

media.description: References to visual or audio assets associated with this character.

references.description: Links to related documentation and structured records.

extensions.description: Namespaced extension data for future consumers. Keys should use reverse-domain notation (e.g. com.example.feature).

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version identifying the character document format.

extensibleLabel.description: Standard enum value or custom kebab-case label for forward-compatible classification.

recordStatus.description: Editorial state of the character record.

lifeStage.description: Audience-appropriate life stage independent of exact age.

trait.description: A named trait with optional context.

description.description: Optional explanation of how the trait manifests in stories.

moralValue.description: A core ethical principle that guides character decisions.

label.description: Name of the value (e.g. kindness, honesty, curiosity).

description.description: How this value appears in the character's choices and stories.

storyRoleEntry.description: A narrative role assignment with optional display label.

label.description: Human-readable role name for UI display when role is custom or needs localization.

primary.description: Whether this is the character's primary narrative role.

storyRoleValue.description: Standard narrative role or custom kebab-case extension.

storyFunctionEntry.description: A functional story archetype used for story matching and casting.

label.description: Human-readable function name for UI display.

weight.description: Optional relevance weight (0–1) for Story Studio matching algorithms.

storyFunctionValue.description: Standard story function or custom kebab-case extension.

personality.description: Personality definition for consistent portrayal across text, voice, and animation.

voice.description: Legacy v1.0 free-text voice description. Deprecated in v1.1 — prefer voiceProfile for structured voice generation.

values.description: Legacy guiding principles field. Deprecated in v1.1 — prefer moralValues for ethical principles.

voiceProfile.description: Structured voice attributes consumed by AI voice generators, audiobook narrators, and dialogue systems.

tone.description: Overall vocal quality (e.g. warm, bright, gentle).

energy.description: Typical vocal energy level (e.g. calm, lively, steady).

accent.description: Accent or dialect descriptor. Use neutral, audience-appropriate labels.

emotionalStyle.description: How emotion is expressed through speech (e.g. expressive, understated, animated).

vocabularyLevel.description: Complexity of word choice appropriate to the character and audience.

notes.description: Additional direction for voice actors or synthesis systems.

animationClipReference.description: Reference to a single animation clip or state.

reference.description: URI, asset id, or pipeline key for the animation resource.

description.description: Direction for animators or procedural systems.

loop.description: Whether the clip should loop during playback.

animationProfile.description: Named animation references for interactive media and AI animation pipelines.

defaultState.description: Key of the default animation state (typically idle).

clips.description: Named animation clips keyed by action. Standard keys are defined; additional keys are permitted.

notes.description: General animation direction not tied to a specific clip.

imageProfile.description: Model-agnostic visual generation settings. Avoid engine-specific parameters.

defaultPrompt.description: Base positive prompt describing the character's canonical visual appearance.

negativePrompt.description: Base negative prompt excluding undesired visual elements.

artStyle.description: Intended artistic style (e.g. watercolor, flat illustration, soft 3D).

lighting.description: Preferred lighting mood (e.g. soft daylight, golden hour, gentle indoor).

cameraStyle.description: Typical framing or camera treatment (e.g. eye-level, warm portrait, wide establishing).

notes.description: Additional visual direction for illustrators and image generation systems.

promptTemplate.description: Reusable, model-agnostic prompt template for a specific AI generation purpose.

prompt.description: Primary prompt text. May include placeholders documented in notes.

negativePrompt.description: Optional negative prompt for generation tasks that support it.

mergeStrategy.description: How consumers should combine this template with dedicated profiles (imageProfile, voiceProfile).

notes.description: Placeholder definitions, usage context, and merge instructions.

promptProfile.description: Centralized prompt templates for AI systems. Complements dedicated profiles; consumers should merge per mergeStrategy to avoid duplication.

image.description: Prompt template for character image generation. Merge with imageProfile when mergeStrategy is append or prepend.

animation.description: Prompt template for animation generation or motion direction.

voice.description: Prompt template for voice synthesis direction. Merge with voiceProfile attributes.

thumbnail.description: Prompt template optimized for small-format preview images.

story.description: Prompt template for AI story generation featuring this character.

birthday.description: Birth date and age information. Supports partial dates and unknown birthdays.

known.description: Whether the birthday is known in canon. When false, omit date fields.

month.description: Birth month when full date is unknown (1–12).

day.description: Birth day when year is unknown (1–31).

age.description: Optional current age in years. Omit for characters whose age is intentionally unspecified.

lifeStage.description: Life stage when exact age is unknown or secondary to narrative role.

favorites.description: Personal preferences used to enrich stories and character interactions.

place.description: Favorite place name or location id reference.

placeId.description: Optional structured reference to a location record.

other.description: Additional labeled favorites not covered by standard fields.

signatureItem.description: An iconic belonging closely associated with the character.

objectId.description: Optional reference to a structured object record.

description.description: Narrative significance or typical usage of the item.

alwaysPresent.description: Whether the item is visually present in most appearances.

appearance.description: Shared visual description applicable to any character kind.

summary.description: Concise visual overview for illustrators, image AI, and marketing.

distinguishingFeatures.description: Notable visual markers that aid recognition across media.

notes.description: Additional visual notes for illustrators or media teams.

ageRange.description: Audience-appropriate age band or life stage.

roles.description: Social or familial roles (e.g. sibling, neighbor). Distinct from storyRoles.

familyGroup.description: Optional identifier linking members of a family unit.

species.description: Species or type label (e.g. dog, bird, turtle).

communication.description: How the animal communicates within stories.

vehicleType.description: Classification of vehicle (e.g. cart, boat, aircraft).

personification.description: Degree to which the vehicle behaves as a character.

relationship.description: A directed or labeled connection to another entity.

targetId.description: Identifier of the related character or entity.

type.description: Relationship category (e.g. friend, sibling, companion, owner).

description.description: Optional narrative context for the relationship.

bidirectional.description: Whether the relationship applies equally in both directions.

uri.description: Relative or absolute URI to the asset.

markdown.description: Relative path to the narrative Markdown profile.

locations.description: Location identifiers associated with this character.

objects.description: Object identifiers associated with this character.

revision.description: Monotonic revision counter for this record.

notes.description: Internal editorial notes not intended for publication.

extensions.description: Forward-compatible extension namespace. Keys must use reverse-domain notation. Values may be any JSON type.

examples.name: Example Human
examples.summary: A curious child who leads stories through questions and kindness.

traits.label: kind
traits.description: Chooses care when others need help.

appearance.summary: Medium height, bright clothing, expressive face.

imageProfile.defaultPrompt: friendly child character, bright clothing, expressive face, children's book illustration
imageProfile.negativePrompt: scary, dark, realistic horror, adult themes

story.prompt: Write a gentle adventure for {{displayName}} who values kindness and curiosity.

examples.name: Example Animal
examples.summary: A loyal animal companion who communicates with the cast.

personality.voice: Short, eager phrases with a cheerful tone.

appearance.summary: Compact build with soft fur and bright eyes.

capabilities.label: tracking
capabilities.description: Can follow scents over short distances.

examples.name: Example Vehicle
examples.summary: A dependable vehicle that helps the cast travel between places.

signatureItems.label: Toolbox
signatureItems.description: Used to help friends with small repairs.

appearance.summary: Rounded body with a painted canopy and wooden wheels.

capacity.description: Bench seating with room for small cargo.
